2604.18381.title: Learning from Less: Measuring the Effectiveness of RLVR in Low Data and Compute Regimes
2604.18381.paper_summary: Fine-tuning Large Language Models (LLMs) typically relies on large quantities of high-quality annotated data, or questions with well-defined ground truth answers in the case of Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR). While previous work has explored the benefits to model reasoning capabilities by scaling both data and compute used for RLVR, these results lack applicability in many real-world settings where annotated data and accessible compute may be scarce. In this work, we present a comprehensive empirical study of open-source Small Language Model (SLM) performance after RLVR in low data regimes. Across three novel datasets covering number counting problems, graph reasoning, and spatial reasoning, we characterize how model performance scales with dataset size, diversity, and complexity. We demonstrate that (1) procedural datasets allow for fine-grained evaluation and training dataset development with controllable properties (size, diversity, and complexity), (2) under RLVR, models trained on lower complexity tasks can generalize to higher complexity tasks, and (3) training on mixed complexity datasets is associated with the greatest benefits in low data regimes, providing up to 5x sample efficiency versus training on easy tasks. These findings inspire future work on the development of data scaling laws for RLVR and the use of procedural data generators to further understand effective data development for efficient LLM fine-tuning.
2604.18381.paper_summary_zh: 微調大型語言模型（LLMs）通常依賴大量高品質的標註數據，或在可驗證獎勵的強化學習（RLVR）情況下，依賴具有明確真實答案的問題。雖然先前的研究已探索通過擴大用於RLVR的數據和計算資源來提升模型推理能力的好處，但這些結果在許多現實世界的環境中缺乏適用性，因為標註數據和可獲得的計算資源可能稀缺。在本研究中，我們呈現了一項全面的實證研究，探討開源小型語言模型（SLM）在低數據環境下經過RLVR後的表現。在涵蓋數字計數問題、圖形推理和空間推理的三個新數據集上，我們描述了模型表現如何隨著數據集的大小、多樣性和複雜性而變化。我們證明了：（1）程序性數據集允許進行細緻的評估和具有可控特性的訓練數據集開發（大小、多樣性和複雜性），（2）在RLVR下，訓練於較低複雜度任務的模型能夠泛化到較高複雜度任務，以及（3）在混合複雜度數據集上訓練與在低數據環境中獲得最大的好處相關，提供了與在簡單任務上訓練相比高達5倍的樣本效率。這些發現激發了未來在RLVR數據擴展法則的開發以及使用程序性數據生成器進一步理解有效數據開發以實現高效LLM微調的研究。
2604.18381.author: Justin Bauer et.al.
2604.18381.authors: Justin Bauer, Thomas Walshe, Derek Pham, Harit Vishwakarma, Armin Parchami, Frederic Sala, Paroma Varma
